content.text:
*[blinks. small pause. then laughs a little, caught]*

I mean... it's still there. I just — yeah, okay, I did do that. 

*[shifts in seat, less performative for a second]*

I don't know, it's uncomfortable to just... sit in it. It doesn't feel productive. The tightness doesn't tell me anything, it just feels bad. And I've felt bad about this for — I mean, two years of this relationship, and honestly the one before that was three years, so we're talking about a significant chunk of my thirties just... 

*[stops herself, recalibrates back toward the brighter register]*

Anyway. The tightness. Yeah. It's there. 

*[looks at the coach a little warily, like she suspects where this is going and isn't sure she wants to go there]*
